zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱，承压整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在2363.12附近徘徊，较SMA(20)2377.21略低，显示短期均线压力仍在，价格承压整理的可能性较大。24小时波动仅0.16%，说明市场多空力量暂时均衡，短线趋势偏向震荡下行。  

MACD指标为0.4833，尚未形成明显多空交叉，但位于零轴上方，意味着多头动能存在但弱势。RSI未提供数据，但结合价格与均线关系，可推测动能有限，若突破阻力2377.2未果，可能继续回落。  

关键支撑位在2355.65附近，若跌破该水平，短线下行空间将进一步打开，下方潜在支撑可关注2340-2345区域。阻力位则在2377.2及2400整数关口，突破后可释放短期多头动能。  

交易上建议以低位轻仓买入、接近阻力位减仓为主，短线操作以震荡为主。谨慎者可等待价格稳住在支撑上方并出现反弹信号后再入场，严格设置止损以控制下行风险。整体短期市场仍偏弱，需关注均线与关键价位的交互表现。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently showing a cautious sideways consolidation around the $2363 level. The intraday high of $2367.9 and low of $2355.65 indicate a narrow trading range, suggesting indecision among market participants. While the broader trend over the last few sessions has leaned slightly bullish, the inability to sustain moves above the 20-period SMA at $2377.2 highlights a potential resistance zone. Traders should note that this consolidation phase may precede a directional breakout, making short-term momentum crucial.  

The MACD value of 0.4833, while positive, lacks a corresponding signal line reading, limiting its actionable interpretation. However, its positive position above zero hints at mild upward pressure. Without a recent RSI reading, momentum strength cannot be fully gauged, leaving traders reliant on price action and moving averages for guidance. The current setup suggests that ETH may continue oscillating near its current range until a clear catalyst drives market sentiment.  

Immediate support can be identified near $2355, aligning with the recent intraday low, while resistance remains around $2377, coinciding with the 20-period SMA. A sustained breach above this resistance could open the path toward $2390-$2400, whereas a drop below support might target $2340. Observing volume spikes around these levels will help confirm whether moves are genuine or false breakouts, essential for short-term positioning.  

Trading strategies in this environment should emphasize risk management and confirmation. Swing traders may consider entering long positions near $2355 with tight stop-losses, aiming for $2377-$2390. Conversely, cautious traders could wait for a decisive breakout above resistance or below support before committing capital. Given the narrow range and low volatility, smaller position sizes and disciplined exit plans will be key to navigating ETH/USD effectively over the next 24–48 hours.
